candidates.text: The new PS4 and PS5 versions of Call of Duty: Black Ops and Black Ops 2 are already full of cheaters. Players have reported hacked lobbies, modded accounts, unlocked items, and other cheats just days after release. People think the games have the same security issues from the original versions because Activision haven't even patched them. Activision has temporarily disabled some multiplayer playlists while investigating. The company hasn’t specified which modes are affected or when they will...

candidates.text: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood is three movies stacked on top of each other, and most people only notice one. There's the real world, where Sharon Tate and Steve McQueen actually existed. There's Tarantino's "realer than real," where his made-up characters shake hands with real people.
